decisions.briefing: Markets were neutral today (NASDAQ +0.3%, S&P 500 +0.4%) with no strong risk-on signal. Per past lessons, we're holding both cash and all 6 existing positions rather than forcing new buys on a low-conviction day, even though several screened candidates (CEPU, BETA, AAP, CAVA) show strong multi-signal setups worth watching if momentum strengthens.

market_education.summary_en: Major indices drifted modestly higher today without a clear catalyst, with the S&P 500 and NASDAQ both posting sub-1% gains that reflect low-conviction, directionless trading rather than a strong risk-on move.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤溫和上揚但缺乏明確催化因素，標普500與納指升幅均低於1%，反映市場方向不明、交投觀望氣氛濃厚，而非明顯的風險偏好上升行情。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sometimes the best move is no move at all. Holding cash on a neutral day isn't wasted opportunity — it preserves capital and flexibility for when a genuinely strong buy signal appears, rather than chasing mediocre setups just to stay 'fully invested'.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 有時候最好的操作就是「不操作」。在方向不明的日子持有現金並非浪費機會，而是保留資本與靈活性，等待真正強勁的買入訊號出現，而不是為了「全額投入」而勉強追逐平庸的機會。
